overview: Only one component exists with no dependencies, so it is implemented in a single foundational phase.

phases.name: Foundation Frontend
phases.description: The single web-app component has no dependencies and can be built immediately.

components.name: hello-web
responsibilities: Render a centered 'Hello World' heading at the root path
Serve static assets via nginx on port 80
components.architectureContext: Sole component of the system; directly serves HTTP requests from end-user browsers. No backend or downstream services involved.
keyConsiderations: Use multi-stage Dockerfile (node:20-alpine build stage, nginx:alpine runtime stage)
Configure nginx location /health to return 200 with application/json content type
Listen on port 80 in the container
Keep bundle minimal — no API calls or extra dependencies
components.apiContract:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Hello Web
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Static web app displaying Hello World
paths:
  /:
    get:
      summary: Serve the Hello World page
      responses:
        '200':
          description: HTML page
          content:
            text/html:
              schema:
                type: string
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health check
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Healthy
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  status:
                    type: string
